title: How do I change the bank account I have on file?
bodyHtml:
1. How do I change the bank account I have on file?

If you wish to change your bank account details, please submit a request to the Seller Support Center under “Finance or legal.” Updates of bank details can be processed by the Seller Support Center only.  

 

  • Bank account in € (euro currency), £ (pound sterling currency)

Bear in mind that the change is not immediate, you need to allow our security payments partner enough time to verify and validate your documents. 

 

2. What is the documentation required?

In order for your request to be processed, you must make sure the Certificate of Good Standing and the Owner’s ID uploaded to your Back-office is up-to-date. 

In order to verify which documents are uploaded for your seller account, here are the steps you need to follow:

 

  • Click on the icon on the top right of your Back-office, then go to “My profile”
  • Then go to the line “Good standing certificate from the Secretary of State” and check if the document uploaded is up-to-date
  • Check the document uploaded for the option “State ID or Passport of Ultimate Business Owner (Front and Back)” as well.

 

3. Which bank document should be provided?

If the information listed above is up-to-date, you can go ahead and create your request in the Seller Support Center with a document issued by your bank attached to your case. 

The document can be: 

 

  • Your account opening letter 
  • Bank statement issued no longer than one year ago

Only an official PDF document extracted from the website of the bank will be accepted (please, do not submit pictures of bank statements you received by post as our security payments partner requires a document where the information available can be screened by the system).

No matter the type of bank document you decide to send, the following information should be shown:

 

  • Account name: should show the name of the company as the account holder (personal bank accounts will not be accepted)
  • IBAN and SWIFT BIC code (if your request concerns the UK market, alternatively you can provide the account and sort code number instead)

After reviewing the above documents, the Seller Support Advisors team will get back to you in short delays with the confirmation that the bank details have been updated. 

 

4. I am registered with Storfund: What should I do? 

The documentation required is the same, all you need to do is make sure the information provided is compliant with the guidelines mentioned above.
